Remember Me (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $19,068,240Details
International Box Office $37,437,880
Worldwide Box Office $56,506,120
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $13,877,070
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,244,858
Total $15,121,928
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$8,089,139 (42.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.36 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,212 opening theaters/2,215 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,904,450

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 12th, 2010 (Wide) by Summit Entertainment
Video Release: June 22nd, 2010 by Summit Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, sexual content, language and smoking
(Rating bulletin 2104, 1/20/2010)
Running Time: 113 minutes
Plot point: 9/11, Coming of Age, Romance, Terrorism
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Time period setting: 1990s, 2000s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Summit Entertainment, Underground Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
